title: lomatium martindalei
intro: Lomatium martindalei, also known as Desert Biscuit Root or Mountain Biscuitroot, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lomatium martindalei include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with the common cold and flu. Lomatium martindalei can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
